

```{r}
library(here)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
```


```{r}
load_formatted_data <- function() {
     load(file=here("data/rss1.rda"))
     load(file=here("data/rss2.rda"))
     load( file=here("data/rss3.rda"))
     load(file=here("data/rss4.rda"))
     load(file=here("data/rss5.rda"))
     load( file=here("data/rss6.rda"))
     load( file=here("data/rss7.rda"))
}
```
```{r}
load_raw_data <- function() {
     load(file=here("data/rss1_raw.rda"))
     load(file=here("data/rss2_raw.rda"))
     load( file=here("data/rss3_raw.rda"))
     load(file=here("data/rss4_raw.rda"))
     load(file=here("data/rss5_raw.rda"))
     load( file=here("data/rss6_raw.rda"))
     load( file=here("data/rss7_raw.rda"))
}
```

```{r}
load(here("data/files_inputs.rda"))
```
```{r}
rss1_raw[ rss1_raw < 0] <- NA
```
